mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_todo_list ( create_time, create_id, update_time, update_id, deleted, organization_id,todo_code, name, type, start_time, initiator_id,assignee_id ,status, data_way, data_id ,form_url ) VALUES ( #{createTime}, #{createId}, #{updateTime}, #{updateId}, #{deleted}, #{organizationId}, #{todoCode}, #{name}, #{type}, #{startTime}, #{initiatorId}, #{assigneeId}, #{status}, #{dataWay}, #{dataId}, #{formUrl} )

INSERT INTO tbl_todo_list (create_time, create_id, update_time, update_id, deleted, organization_id, name, type, start_time, end_time, due_time, initiator_id, assignee_id, assignee_unit, status, todo_code, data_id, form_url, process) VALUES
(#{item.createTime}, #{item.createId}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateId}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.organizationId}, #{item.name}, #{item.type}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.dueTime}, #{item.initiatorId}, #{item.assigneeId}, #{item.assigneeUnit}, #{item.status}, #{item.todoCode}, #{item.dataId}, #{item.formUrl}, #{item.process})

update.foreach: UPDATE tbl_todo_list SET update_time = #{item.updateTime}, update_id = #{item.updateId}, deleted = #{item.deleted}, organization_id = #{item.organizationId}, name = #{item.name}, type = #{item.type}, start_time = #{item.startTime}, end_time = #{item.endTime}, due_time = #{item.dueTime}, initiator_id = #{item.initiatorId}, assignee_id = #{item.assigneeId}, assignee_unit = #{item.assigneeUnit}, status = #{item.status}, todo_code = #{item.todoCode}, data_id = #{item.dataId}, form_url = #{item.formUrl} WHERE id = #{item.id}
